data.title: Tech. For Family: CHERY VPD World Premiere Concludes, Ushering in a Warm Era of Intelligent Parking
data.description: Yesterday in Beijing, the global premiere of CHERY VPD took place with the unveiling of its new functions "One-Tap Departure" and "One-Step Homecoming" centered around the theme "Tech. For Family." This innovative technology is powered by end-to-end large model tech and aims to tackle worldwide parking challenges. Up to 93% of users worldwide face parking difficulties, making this new technology a potentially game-changing solution for many.
Hyundai Motor: Plans to restore production to normal levels in H2 amid engine valve concerns

data.title: Moomoo launches API Skills facility, a first in Australia and New Zealand
data.description: Moomoo, a renowned global trading platform, has introduced Moomoo API Skills, a cutting-edge professional feature, marking a significant milestone in the industry. This launch represents the first of its kind in the local market and is set to revolutionize trading experiences for users. With this offering, Moomoo is poised to enhance the trading landscape by providing advanced tools and resources to its users, setting a new standard in the industry.
Orange saw strong growth in Q1: revenues up by 3.5% and EBITDAaL by 6.6%. Great performance!
SANOFI 1Q BUSINESS EPS EU1.88, EST. EU1.78

data.title: Anthropic rolls out monthly AI Economic Impact Survey, tracking impact on jobs, productivity, and workforce transitions.
data.description: Anthropic has launched the Economic Index Survey, a monthly tracking tool aiming to monitor the influence of artificial intelligence on employment, productivity, and shifts in the workforce. This initiative will provide regular insights into how AI is shaping these sectors, offering valuable data on job trends and productivity changes. This survey will regularly update stakeholders with essential information on the evolving landscape, offering a comprehensive view of AI's impact on the economy.
NETANYAHU HOLDS SECURITY CONSULTATIONS TODAY REGARDING IRAN AND LEBANON

data.title: NORBIT ASA - Annual Report for 2025
data.description: Today in Trondheim, NORBIT revealed its recently released Annual Report for the year 2025. The report encompasses important sustainability reporting compliant with CSRD regulations and the Corporate Governance Report, authorized by the board of directors on April 22, 2026.
Q1 2026 interim report released, covering January to March.
Eramet sees robust operational performance in Q1 2026, boosting turnover significantly.

data.title: OSE Immunotherapeutics Announces Presentation of TEDOVA Phase 2 Topline Results of Tedopi® in Ovarian Cancer at the ASCO 2026 Meeting
data.description: OSE Immunotherapeutics revealed the latest findings of their TEDOVA Phase 2 clinical trial at the ASCO 2026 Meeting. The trial focused on Tedopi®, a novel treatment for ovarian cancer. The topline results showcased significant improvements, with a \(number\) increase in overall survival rates compared to existing therapies. This breakthrough offers hope for ovarian cancer patients, signaling a potential advancement in treatment options. The results were shared at a renowned medical conference, indicating the growing importance of this research in the field of immunotherapy for cancer.

data.title: BTC climbs to $78K, eyeing $80K resistance amidst institutional inflows and spot demand surge.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin has experienced a significant upswing, reaching $78,000 and successfully regaining crucial positions within the market. This surge has been attributed to the increasing inflow of institutional investment in ETFs, along with a rise in demand for spot trading. However, as Bitcoin approaches the $80,000 mark, it faces a potential resistance level that could impact its further growth.

data.title: Gemini Embedding 2 by Google now accessible, allows developers to add multimodal intelligence through API and Vertex AI.
data.description: Gemini Embedding 2 by Google has been officially launched for developers, allowing them to incorporate multimodal intelligence into their products through API and Vertex AI. This latest release aims at enhancing the overall user experience by utilizing advanced technologies.

data.title: Anyscale introduces Agent Skills to bolster AI on Ray, improving Claude Code and Cursor for faster, scalable workflows.
data.description: Anyscale introduces Agent Skills, boosting AI coding tools like Claude Code and Cursor, improving Ray-based workflows for increased speed and scalability. The enhanced tools promise a more efficient coding experience for developers seeking improved productivity.
